paper_title: Diversification and Genetic Analysis of P. tentorius Species Complex

methods.description: This method involves analyzing diversification dynamics, evolutionary rate heterogeneity, and significant rate shifts across different clades of the P. tentorius species complex using Bayesian statistical frameworks and various R packages.

steps.description: Employ the Bayesian statistical framework approach of the BAMM software, together with the R packages 'BAMMtools' and Ape.
steps.searchable_summary: Use BAMM and R packages to model diversification dynamics

steps.description: Use the 'setBAMMpriors' function to determine a proper prior for the expected number of shifts, initial λ, λ shift, and initial μ.
steps.searchable_summary: Set BAMM priors for diversification analysis

steps.description: Conduct analyses with four simultaneous MCMC chains for 50 million generations using the 'speciation-extinction' model.
steps.searchable_summary: Run MCMC chains for diversification analysis

steps.description: Reconstruct a matrix with macroevolutionary cohort analysis to look for differences in the macroevolutionary rate regime among lineages.
Generate a phylorate plot with optimal rate shift scheme through BAMMtools to visualize evolutionary rate variation.
steps.searchable_summary: Create phylorate plot for rate variation visualization

steps.description: Construct Rate through Time (RTT) plots using BAMM on all groups to visualize diversification rate shift against temporal scales.
steps.searchable_summary: Create RTT plots for diversification visualization

steps.description: Compute diversification rate (λ) and extinction rate (μ) independently for each clade using R packages 'dplyr', 'readr', and 'ggplot2'.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate λ and μ for each clade

steps.description: Perform TESS Bayesian inference analysis using the R package 'TESS' to validate diversification rate results from BAMM.

methods.description: This method uses MuSSE and BiSSE analyses to assess the influence of geographic barriers and biomes on the historical diversification of the P. tentorius species complex.

steps.description: Perform MuSSE analysis to evaluate the influence of geographic barriers on diversification.
steps.searchable_summary: Conduct MuSSE analysis for geographic influence

steps.description: Perform BiSSE analysis to evaluate the influence of biomes on diversification.
steps.searchable_summary: Conduct BiSSE analysis for biome influence

methods.description: This method involves determining genetic structure and identifying putative clusters in the microsatellite dataset using DAPC and STRU CTU RE analyses.

steps.description: Perform DAPC using the R package 'adegenet' to determine genetic structure and identify clusters.
steps.searchable_summary: Conduct DAPC for genetic structure analysis

steps.description: Use STRU CTU RE v 2.3 to map the best cluster scheme using Admixture as ancestry model.
steps.searchable_summary: Map cluster scheme with STRU CTU RE

steps.description: Partition the microsatellite dataset into testing schemes and run STRU CTU RE analysis on each scheme independently.
steps.searchable_summary: Partition dataset and run STRU CTU RE analysis

steps.description: Use STRU CTU RE HARVESTER to summarize outputs of STRU CTU RE.
